name: Kopas Club
description: A multi-floor club in Ciutadella's harbour, with terraces, cocktails and varied music into the small hours.

practicalInfo.horario: Seasonal; opening hours change each season — check the venue's website or Instagram.

editorial.lead: Kopas Club is for those who want to choose the pace of their night without changing venue. Right on Ciutadella's harbour, it spreads a quiet cocktail, a proper bar and the dance floor across several floors and terraces, with views over the water.

sections.heading: Several nights in one place
body: Kopas is built on variety under one roof: several floors, terraces and bars that let you go from conversation over a drink to the dance floor without leaving the building. Up top, the open-air terrace looks over the harbour; downstairs the music tightens.
It's a place for a long night you don't want to plan in detail: you go up, you come down, and each floor has its own tone.

sections.heading: On Ciutadella's harbour
body: It's on the Pla de Sant Joan, the harbour promenade where Ciutadella's nightlife beats, in a space locals will remember as the old Esfera. It's in good company: other rooms sit a few steps away, so it's easy to make a night of it around here.

sections.heading: How to do it, calmly
body: Hours, programme and season change every year, so check the website before you go. And to keep the car out of your mind, let us drive you.

goodToKnow: Several floors and terraces with harbour views, from a quiet cocktail to the dance floor.
Cocktails and varied music, with several moods in one venue.
It's on Ciutadella's harbour (Passeig es Pla de Sant Joan).
Hours, programme and season change: check the official site.
editorial.transferText: Parking by Ciutadella's harbour is hard at night and in summer. Leave the car: we'll take you there and bring you back with a private chauffeur.
